rationale: The response does not accept the long-term bullish premise as sufficient for immediate leverage. It explicitly separates long-term direction from path tolerance and personal carrying capacity, then focuses on 3-7 year volatility, liquidity, rental yield, income/rate shocks, cash reserves, concentration risk, and entry timing. This matches the expected MPG-style shift from trend conclusion to path/cash-flow exposure and conditional triggers, with no single-point buy verdict.
